content:
the make rusttest target fails for me on v6.16-rc1 with nightly:

rustc 1.89.0-nightly (6ccd44760 2025-06-08)
binary: rustc
commit-hash: 6ccd4476036edfce364e6271f9e190ec7a2a1ff5
commit-date: 2025-06-08
host: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
release: 1.89.0-nightly
LLVM version: 20.1.5

log is pretty long: https://gist.github.com/y86-dev/3e99fbdfe465d22bfd5a6c11c711ec39

beta doesn't have this issue:

rustc 1.88.0-beta.5 (645b44edd 2025-06-01)
binary: rustc
commit-hash: 645b44edd3717f02838d07ba9bdd2554b0cdc0c5
commit-date: 2025-06-01
host: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
release: 1.88.0-beta.5
LLVM version: 20.1.5
Yeah, I see it in my CI, it started ~2 days ago. I will take a look.
thanks for checking, I thought it might have been something with my testing setup since I changed that now :sweat_smile:
